Object.Field: Duplicate package of LH_AVY_PKG_LOAD_AVY_FACT_V1_RT_ST to load to AVY_FACT_SIDE, a side table to assist in testing the consistency of semantic rollout changes introducing over 120 new attributes to AVY_FACT. -SCEN_STATUS=VALID

Purpose:
Usage: Specific to Project or generals
SELECT APPLICATION_PROPERTY_VALUE FROM <?=odiRef.getSchemaName("SSDS_UTIL_OWNER", "D") ?>.application_property WHERE APPLICATION_PROPERTY_NAME='SSDS_BATCH_DATE' AND STATUS_CODE='A'

Insert into <?=odiRef.getSchemaName("SSDS_UTIL_OWNER", "D") ?>.SSDS_SESS_LOG ( SESS_NO, SESS_NAME, MRKR_NM, MRKR_DESC, SESS_STRT, CDS_BATCH_DATE, JOB_STATUS, CRT_DTM, CRT_USR_NM ) select :GLOBAL.GV_ODI_SESS_NO SESS_NO, '<?=odiRef.getSession("SESS_NAME") ?>' SESS_NAME, :SSDS.SSDS_MARKER_NAME MRKR_NM, ( SELECT distinct MRKR_DSC FROM <?=odiRef.getSchemaName("SSDS_UTIL_OWNER", "D") ?>.SSDS_MRKR_CONFIG WHERE MRKR_NM= :SSDS.SSDS_MARKER_NAME ) MRKR_DESC, --'<?=odiRef.getSession("SESS_BEG") ?>' SESS_STRT, SYSDATE SESS_STRT, :SSDS.SSDS_CDS_BATCH_DT, 'INPROGRESS' JOB_STATUS, SYSDATE CRT_DTM, '<?=odiRef.getSession("SESS_NAME") ?>' from dual

MERGE INTO CCAL_REPL_OWNER.J$AVY_FACT J$AVY_FACT USING (SELECT J$AVY_FACT.ROWID ROW_REF, J$AVY_FACT.TXN_ID, J$AVY_FACT.JRN_DATE, DECODE((ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY J$AVY_FACT.TXN_ID ORDER BY J$AVY_FACT.JRN_DATE DESC, J$AVY_FACT.NUMBER_OF_ATTEMPTS DESC)) , 1, 'Y', 'D') AS REF_JRN_CONSUMED, CASE WHEN J$AVY_FACT.JRN_DATE <= MRK_DT.TRGT_CMMT_TMS THEN MRK_DT.BATCH_DT ELSE CAL.NBD END AS NBD FROM <?=odiRef.getSchemaName("CCAL_REPL_OWNER", "D") ?>.J$AVY_FACT, ( SELECT SSDS_MRKR_CONFIG.SRC_STM_ID, SSDS_MRKR_CONFIG.MRKR_NM, MAX(CDS_MRKR_LOG.BTCH_DT) BATCH_DT, MAX(CDS_MRKR_LOG.TRGT_CMMT_TMS) TRGT_CMMT_TMS FROM <?=odiRef.getSchemaName("SSDS_UTIL_OWNER", "D") ?>.CDS_MRKR_LOG, <?=odiRef.getSchemaName("SSDS_UTIL_OWNER", "D") ?>.SSDS_MRKR_CONFIG WHERE MRKR_TP_NM = 'AVY' AND CDS_MRKR_LOG.MRKR_NM = SSDS_MRKR_CONFIG.MRKR_NM AND CDS_MRKR_LOG.PCS_F = 'Y' GROUP BY SSDS_MRKR_CONFIG.SRC_STM_ID, SSDS_MRKR_CONFIG.MRKR_NM ) MRK_DT, (SELECT CAL_DT, LEAD(CAL_DT) OVER (ORDER BY CAL_DT) NBD FROM <?=odiRef.getSchemaName("COMMON_OWNER", "D") ?>.DATE_DIM , <?=odiRef.getSchemaName("SSDS_UTIL_OWNER", "D") ?>.APPLICATION_PROPERTY a WHERE DATE_DIM.BUS_DY_FLAG='Y' AND (a.APPLICATION_PROPERTY_NAME='AVY_BACTH_DATE_HIST' AND a.APPLICATION_PROPERTY_VALUE='N') ) CAL WHERE J$AVY_FACT.JRN_SUBSCRIBER= :GLOBAL.MONITOR_SUBCRIBER_NAME AND J$AVY_FACT.THREAD_NO = :GLOBAL.GV_RT_THRD_NO AND J$AVY_FACT.JRN_CONSUMED = 'Y' AND NVL(J$AVY_FACT.NUMBER_OF_ATTEMPTS,0) < :GLOBAL.GV_RT_NUMBER_OF_ATTEMPTS AND J$AVY_FACT.SRC_STM_ID = MRK_DT.SRC_STM_ID(+) AND MRK_DT.BATCH_DT = CAL.CAL_DT(+) ORDER BY J$AVY_FACT.JRN_DATE,J$AVY_FACT.NUMBER_OF_ATTEMPTS DESC FETCH FIRST :GLOBAL.MONITOR_RECORDS_PER_THREAD ROWS ONLY ) MERGE_QUERY ON (J$AVY_FACT.TXN_ID = MERGE_QUERY.TXN_ID AND J$AVY_FACT.ROWID = MERGE_QUERY.ROW_REF ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET J$AVY_FACT.JRN_CONSUMED = MERGE_QUERY.REF_JRN_CONSUMED, J$AVY_FACT.BATCH_DT = MERGE_QUERY.NBD
